title: Alpha recursion theory
body:
In recursion theory, α recursion theory is a generalisation of recursion theory to subsets of admissible ordinals 
  
    
      
        α
      
    
    {\displaystyle \alpha }
  
.  An admissible set is closed under 
  
    
      
        
          Σ
          
            1
          
        
        (
        
          L
          
            α
          
        
        )
      
    
    {\displaystyle \Sigma _{1}(L_{\alpha })}
  
 functions, where 
  
    
      
        
          L
          
            ξ
          
        
      
    
    {\displaystyle L_{\xi }}
  
 denotes a rank of Godel's constructible hierarchy. 
  
    
      
        α
      
    
    {\displaystyle \alpha }
  
 is an admissible ordinal if 
  
    
      
        
          L
          
            α
          
        
      
    
    {\displaystyle L_{\alpha }}
  
 is a  model of Kripke–Platek set theory.  In what follows 
  
    
      
        α
      
    
    {\displaystyle \alpha }
  
 is considered to be fixed.
